title: AT&T Stadium Dallas — FIFA 2026 VIP Guide
excerpt: Discover the ultimate VIP experience at AT&T Stadium for FIFA 2026. From luxury suites to private jet arrivals and Rolls-Royce transfers, this guide covers everything you need for an unforgettable World Cup match in Dallas.
content:
## Welcome to the Home of FIFA 2026 in Dallas

AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas, is one of the premier venues for the FIFA 2026 World Cup. With a seating capacity of over 100,000, this architectural marvel will host some of the most anticipated matches of the tournament. For discerning fans, the stadium offers an unparalleled VIP experience that blends world-class football with luxury hospitality. Whether you're visiting for a group stage thriller or a knockout clash, this guide will help you navigate the best of what AT&T Stadium has to offer in 2026.

## Unmatched Luxury Hospitality Suites

AT&T Stadium is famous for its opulent suites, and during FIFA 2026, these spaces will be transformed into exclusive havens for VIP guests. Each suite features plush seating, private catering with gourmet menus, and dedicated service staff. From your suite, you'll enjoy panoramic views of the pitch while savoring champagne and canapés. For the ultimate indulgence, consider the Owner’s Suite, which includes a private terrace and direct access to the club level. These suites are limited and highly sought after—early booking through our FIFA 2026 VIP hospitality service ensures you secure the best options.

## Arrive in Style: Private Jet and Rolls-Royce Transfers

Your VIP journey begins long before you enter the stadium. Dallas/Fort Worth International Airport (DFW) is a major hub for private aviation, with dedicated FBOs (Fixed Base Operators) that cater to elite travelers. Our service arranges seamless private jet arrivals, where you'll be greeted by a personal concierge and escorted to a waiting Rolls-Royce or Bentley. The drive from DFW to AT&T Stadium takes just 20 minutes, offering a smooth and luxurious transition. For those staying in downtown Dallas, a chauffeured Rolls-Royce will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring you arrive at the stadium in absolute comfort and style.

## Exclusive Pre-Match and Halftime Experiences

Beyond the match itself, AT&T Stadium offers a range of VIP experiences that elevate your day. Pre-match, you can enjoy a curated tasting menu at the stadium's Michelin-starred restaurant, The Club at AT&T, which features private dining rooms and a wine cellar with rare vintages. During halftime, VIP guests have access to exclusive lounges with premium bars and live entertainment. For an extra touch of luxury, our team can arrange a private tour of the stadium's art collection, which includes works by renowned artists. These experiences are designed to make your FIFA 2026 visit truly unforgettable.

## Book Your VIP Consultation Today

Don't miss the opportunity to witness history at AT&T Stadium during the FIFA 2026 World Cup. From luxury suites and private jet travel to Rolls-Royce transfers and bespoke hospitality, our team specializes in crafting the ultimate VIP experience. Contact us today to schedule a confidential consultation and secure your place at the world's greatest sporting event. Let us handle every detail—so you can focus on the beautiful game.
